subcodes.first_line: Thy remembrance hath been made mention of before the Throne, and the glance of divine favour is directed towards thee. Be thou not saddened by the world and its diverse conditions [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکرت لدی العرش مذکور و طرف عنایت بتو ناظر از دنیا و شئونات مختلفه او محزون
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @love of God, @chastisement and requital, @consolation and comfort, @radiant countenance; bearing the divine fragrance
